security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: A local-only synthetic shell used to evaluate the Keiko Native desktop host boundary.
